before.lore: Some places must be protected at all costs. In a frigid, worldwide desert of apathy and ruination, there somehow still remain some oases of love and warmth. Keep them safe, as long as you can.

before.lore: Barrages of rain and ice can bite and break; symphonies thunder and wind can deafen and crash. The worst storms, though, the kind that leave no survivors; those creep up quietly, steal in through the moonlit fields, and whisk the world away without a trace.

majorIds.Combo Stomp: Landing directly on an enemy with Fierce Stomp sends you back into the air and resets Escape.

before.lore: An age of oxidation. To assert that you will remain, and others all across the world will be left behind. To overwhelm everything with toxic air, ensuring that extinctions follow your wake. Some stop breathing, but the gears of time march on.

after.lore: An age of oxidation. To assert that you will remain, and others all across the world will be left behind. To overwhelm everything with toxic air, ensuring that extinctions follow your wake. Some stop breathing, but the gears of time march on.
